zh: 弗兰克的第一份工作是什么?

text: Yesterday afternoon Frank Hawkins was telling me about
zh: 昨天下午,弗兰克·霍金斯跟我讲起了

text: his experiences as a young man.
a very large business company, but as a boy he used to work in a small shop.
zh: 一家大企业的老板,可他小时候却在一家小店里打工。

text: It was his job to repair bicycles
and at that time he used to work fourteen hours a day.
zh: 那时他每天要工作十四个小时。

text: He saved money for years and
in 1958 he bought a small workshop of his own.
zh: 于是在1958年买下了一间属于自己的小作坊。

text: In his twenties Frank used to make spare parts for aeroplanes.
zh: 二十多岁时,弗兰克曾为飞机制造零部件。

text: At that time he had two helpers.
In a few years the small workshop had become a large factory
zh: 没过几年,这间小作坊就发展成了一家大工厂,

text: which employed seven hundred and twenty-eight people.
zh: 雇用了七百二十八名员工。

text: Frank smiled when he remembered his hard early years and the long road to success.
zh: 弗兰克回想起早年的艰辛和成功之路的漫长,不禁笑了。

text: He was still smiling when the door opened and his wife came in.
zh: 他还笑着的时候,门开了,他妻子走了进来。

text: She wanted him to repair their grandson's bicycle!
zh: 她是想让他修一修孙子的自行车!
